title: 453L Blue Rt46K6040Ut Lv
features: Compressor optimized to save energy and last long

Enjoy greater energy efficiency, less noise and a long-lasting performance. Unlike conventional compressors, which just start and stop, the Digital Inverter Compressor automatically adjusts its speed in response to cooling demand across 7 levels. As a result, it’s much quieter and uses significantly less power*. It also reduces wear and tear, so it is certified to keep working like new for 21 years*. And, for added peace of mind, it is backed up by 20 year warranty**(limited to the compressor only), longest in the industry.
Moisture-Full Freshness all over the fridge

Only Twin Cooling Plus™ creates a favorable environment for preserving fresh food in the fridge with 70% humidity, compared to 30% in a conventional TMF. So it keeps ingredients fresh for longer without drying out.
Deliciously tasty, odor free frozen food
The Twin Cooling Plus™ system cools the compartments separately to stop unexpected odors spreading from fridge to freezer. So frozen food retains more of its original flavor.

Provides the ultimate in flexible storae. Easily convet your freezer into a fridge to keep all the fresh food you need to store for different seasons or special occasions. Or switch to off* mode to save evergy, depending on spec.

Rapidly delivers intensely cold air to fast freeze or cool. At the touch of a button, Power Cool quickly chills food and drinks, while Power Freeze is great for freezing or firming up frozen food and making ice.
Easy to find and reach food at the back

Reaching into a refrigerator often means navigating an obstacle course of items. The Easy Slide shelf lets you efficiently store, organize and access your food – easily reaching things at the back and in corners.
Keeps air hygienically clean and fresh

An Anti-Bacterial Protector keeps the fridge clean and hygienic. Air is passed through an Activated Carbon filter, so it is constantly sterilized and deodorized, while an anti-bacterial mesh eliminates bacteria.

High efficiency LED lighting is slimmer, cooler and more power-efficient than conventional lighting. Located on the top, it beautifully and brilliantly illuminates every corner, ensuring better visibility.
